title: Deriving the Einstein coupling 16piG/c4 from the lattice + F25/F26

tests.name: C1_coupling_lock_4pi_implies_16pi
tests.note: given Newton 4π + trace reversal, tensor coupling is forced

tests.name: C2_fourpi_lattice_solid_angle_plus_isotropy
tests.note: 4πC→1 (no 4π inserted) and isotropic c_lat are one lattice fact

tests.name: C3_sakharov_Lambda2_scaling
tests.note: 1/(16πG_ind) ∝ Λ²/c_lat ⇒ G ∝ ℓ²; c_lat=1/√d enters the coefficient. Lattice spacing in metres is the one free input.
